fallback.connector_missing: degrade to manual evidence or screenshot with explicit inference and unknowns
fallback.feature_flag: external Product Design and design-source plugins remain disabled until explicitly selected
fallback.provider_missing: degrade optional Product Design capability; block only when explicitly required
fallback.structured_fact_missing: block when the missing fact is required for implementation
fallback.write_approval_missing_or_expired: block write; never reuse approval across attempts

owners.disciplines/design: Design Evidence, Canonical UI IR, Design System Registry, task-scoped Agent Packet and pure source normalization.
owners.platforms/apple: Apple source evidence extension, SwiftUI/UIKit binding and Apple validation evidence.
owners.providers/figma-design-source-provider: Optional explicit Figma read/export/write bridge; permissions remain separate and the runtime plugin stays disabled by default.
owners.src/agent_workflow/design: Credential-free runtime invariants, approval scope and deterministic compiler.

design-source-write.scope: single attempt plus exact document/page/node allowlist

providers.version_source: provider manifest supplied at selection time
provider manifest supplied with the Figma plugin binding

retention.cleanup: provider cache cleanup required before successful completion
retention.ledger: hash, controlled URI and approval fact only
